guardrails.note: Read-only search-query coverage planner. Query variants are editorial review prompts, not measured search volume, ranking, click, or traffic claims.
guardrails.stopBefore: Use the query list to guide human review and content expansion. Do not publish or mark review without explicit human approval.

plannerGuardrails.note: Read-only continuous wave planner for human review. It does not modify article status, noindex, review, or publishing state.
plannerGuardrails.stopBefore: Each wave still requires explicit human approval before mark:review --confirm-human or publish:articles --confirm.

sourceEvidence.note: Queries are derived from approved search-intent waves, primary keywords, lane intent seeds, review focus, and common how-to/template/comparison/troubleshooting modifiers.
